markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress and plan for embedding workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workflow embedding is live:** The technical capability to embed interactive workflows is now live, using a simple `{{logic-workflow slug="[slug]" caption="[caption]"}}` string in Storyblok.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [**Pilot will use vetted workflows:** The initial pilot will use Logic's 36 high-quality, industry-specific workflows, leveraging existing assets to test the process quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Looker reporting requires a fix:** The Looker dashboard is misconfigured, showing too many cohorts. Bailey will remap them to the four strategic topic clusters for accurate performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [**Manual publishing continues for now:** Logic will continue manually publishing articles for 1-2 weeks to ensure image and workflow integration is smooth before automating the process.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)

## Topics

### Content & Site Updates

  - [**New Features:** Logic shipped two key features for the blog:](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [Table of Contents (ToC)](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [Blog Categories/Tags](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** The pipeline is temporarily stalled due to a lack of article approvals from HX.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
      - [**In Review:** 5 articles](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [**In Production:** 5 articles](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Strategy: Embedding Workflows

  - [**Goal:** Embed interactive workflows directly into blog content to demonstrate product value and drive conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**Technical Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [The system uses a simple string in Storyblok to trigger an embed: `{{logic-workflow slug="[slug]" caption="[caption]"}}`](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [This method is familiar to GrowthX (similar to Webflow CTAs) and simplifies engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [**Pilot Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Asset Selection:** Use the 36 vetted workflows from Logic's industry pages.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This leverages existing, high-quality assets to test the process quickly and efficiently.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX will manually identify the best placement for workflows in upcoming and existing articles. This manual test will validate the editorial process before building automation.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

### Strategy: Aligning Analytics & Content

  - [**Problem:** The Looker dashboard is misconfigured, showing too many cohorts instead of the four strategic topic clusters defined in the content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [**Impact:** This prevents accurate performance analysis of content clusters (e.g., traffic, conversions) and hinders strategic decision-making.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Bailey will investigate the Looker setup and remap the cohorts to the correct topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [**Related Action:** Bailey will also review blog categories to align them more closely with the topic clusters for better UX and tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

### Opportunity: Signup Page Optimization

  - [**Suggestion:** Add a blurred product screenshot to the signup page background.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This tactic has been shown to significantly lift conversion rates by providing visual context for the product.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [**Context:** The suggestion is highly relevant as Logic is currently overhauling its signup flow, bringing it back onto its own property from WorkOS.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Steve:**](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
      - [Share the updated workflow spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
      - [Ship the embedded workflow feature today.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
      - [Review Looker setup and remap cohorts to topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
      - [Review blog categories for alignment with topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [Prioritize articles matching the 36 vetted workflows for the pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [Begin manual workflow embedding in articles once the feature is live.](https://fathom.video/share/7KLeKaJP_5LMyQBuastkaprhR4DNwXZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
